title: Multimodal AI — When AI Sees and Hears

scenes.name: Title
scenes.text: Multimodal AI. [pause] When AI no longer just reads — it sees, and it hears.

scenes.name: Beyond text
scenes.text: Until recently, tools like ChatGPT worked only with text. [pause] Today's models are <emphasis>multimodal</emphasis> — they can handle text, images, audio, and video together, in one conversation.

scenes.name: Definition
scenes.text: Multimodal simply means <emphasis>multiple modes</emphasis> of information. [pause] Just like teaching — voice, board, image, demonstration — all in one lesson.

scenes.name: Analyze
scenes.text: AI can analyze what you upload. [pause] A photo of a leaf. A student's handwritten essay. A chart from a textbook. [pause] It describes, summarizes, gives feedback.

scenes.name: Generate
scenes.text: AI can also <emphasis>generate</emphasis> media. [pause] Custom diagrams from a sentence. Natural-sounding speech in dozens of languages. Short video clips. [pause] No design skills required.

scenes.name: Classroom
scenes.text: Imagine a biology lesson. [pause] Before — AI generates a labeled leaf diagram. During — students upload their photos. After — AI transcribes their spoken reflections. [pause] One lesson. Three modalities.

scenes.name: Caution
scenes.text: The same caution applies as with text. [pause] The model recognizes patterns, not meaning. [pause] It can misidentify objects, misread handwriting, generate hands with too many fingers. [pause] Always verify.

scenes.name: Start small
scenes.text: Where to start. [pause] Upload one image. Ask one question. [pause] That single interaction reveals both the power and the limits — in a way you can immediately use.

scenes.name: Closing
scenes.text: AI that sees. [pause] AI that listens.
